The A-ROSA Ifen Hotel Kleinwalsertal in Hirschegg in the Kleinwalsertal offers you air-conditioned rooms with balcony or terrace, a 2,500 m² spa area and free WiFi.
The SPA ROSA offers a large indoor pool, a 25 meter long outdoor infinity pool, a spacious sauna area and 15 treatment rooms.
There is also a children's playroom, 2 function rooms and an underground car park.
The Ifen Hotel has a total of 3 different restaurants including the star restaurant Kilian Stuba.
Walser regional cuisine is served in the Carnozet restaurant, and Theo's restaurant has a show kitchen and a terrace with mountain views.

The Mercure Graz City is ideally located just a few steps from Graz’s historic centre and only 400 meters from the Schlossberg, home to the city’s iconic clock tower.
Cultural highlights, including the Graz Opera House, the Kunsthaus Museum, and the Schauspielhaus Theatre, are all within a 15-minute walking distance.
Guests can relax and stay active in the hotel’s fitness and wellness area, or make use of the business corner in the lobby, which provides internet access for work-related needs.

Located directly at the shore of the lake, TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee offers rooms with elegant, wooden furniture and a flat-screen cable TV.
El TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee está situado a orillas del lago y ofrece habitaciones con muebles de madera elegantes y TV de pantalla plana por cable.

Situato proprio sulla riva del lago, il TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee vi attende con camere eleganti provviste di mobili in legno e TV via cavo a schermo piatto, un ristorante e un'area benessere con vista panoramica sul lago e sui Monti Totes.
Tutte le sistemazioni vantano un minibar, un bagno con set di cortesia e asciugacapelli, la connessione gratuita a internet via cavo e, in alcuni casi, la vista sul lago, un'area salotto o un divano-letto.
Il ristorante in loco SEEplatz’l serve specialità austriache e internazionali preparate con prodotti locali.

Implanté sur la rive du lac, le TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee propose des logements dotés d'un mobilier en bois élégant et d'une télévision par câble à écran plat. Il dispose d'un restaurant ainsi que d'un espace bien-être offrant une vue panoramique sur le lac et le massif mort.
Toutes les chambres comportent un minibar ainsi qu'une salle de bains pourvue d'un sèche-cheveux et d'articles de toilette.
